title: lycopodiella bradei
intro: Lycopodiella bradei, also known as Brade's forked spike moss, is a species of fern-like, non-vascular plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Lycopodiella bradei include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Lycopodiella bradei can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal preparations.
